name: Request → Human Approval → Email Notification
description: Fetches a request payload, pauses for human review and approval, then sends an email confirming the decision.

config.REASON: Please review the request before proceeding

config.SUBJECT: Request Approved
config.BODY: Your request has been reviewed and approved.

required_secrets.description: Gmail OAuth2 refresh token with gmail.send scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace TO+SUBJECT+BODY with CHANNEL (e.g. '#approvals'). Required secret: slack/bot_token instead of google/gmail_oauth_token. Good when approvers and requesters are primarily in Slack.
